refnamediv.refpurpose: Convert Hough peaks to image-border line segments.

listitem.para: Angle vector, in degrees, returned by imhough.
Two-row matrix of [rho index; theta index] peaks returned by imhoughpeaks.
Source image dimensions. The first two values are interpreted as rows and columns.
One line segment per row in [x1 y1 x2 y2] image coordinates.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Converts Hough accumulator peak indices into line segments clipped to the image rectangle. Returned coordinates use the upper-left image origin. Convert the endpoints with rect2cart before drawing them with Scilab plotting functions.

refsection.title: Examples
